sections.paragraph:
Original: נבט

Transliteration: nâbaṭ

Phonetic: naw-bat'

BDB Definition:

  1. to look, regard
    1. (Piel) to look
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to look
      2. to regard, show regard to, pay attention to, consider
      3. to look upon, regard, show regard to

Origin:

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
